title: dryopteris simplex
intro: Dryopteris simplex, also known as the eastern hay-scented fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris simplex include its ability to help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Dryopteris simplex can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
